name: Arcane Weapon
description: You imbue a weapon you touch with magical energy. For the duration, the weapon deals an additional 1d4 force damage on each hit and glows with faint magical light.
effect: Touched weapon deals an extra 1d4 force damage on each hit for 1 minute (concentration).
notes: Concentration required — competing with other concentration spells
Mana 2: sustained damage buff lasting up to 10 combat rounds is stronger than a single-hit cantrip
